---
title: 'Worldviews affect the Writer, which effect the writing.'
date: '2015-12-21T01:39:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2761118993504225875'
blogger_filename: '/2015/12/worldviews-affect-writer-which-effect.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Keys To Success'
  - 'Stories'
  - 'Spiritual Growth'
---

<br /><i>They're here!</i><br /><br />Chester snapped awake...<br /><br />His heart pumped against his chest like a <a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Battering_ram" target="_blank">battering ram</a>, with the police just outside the door. Chester's skin was cold, clammy. Bed clothes were soaked.<br /><br />Fog slowly cleared from his mind, under the light of a new dawn...<br /><br /><div style="text-align: center;"><b>***&nbsp;</b></div><br />"They felt so real." Chester said to Ms. Wu, as he helped her run his own personal brand of Anti Virus software on the Orphanage Computers. He could have done it from home, but he enjoyed their weekly talks. "Black leather and mist were swirling about me, chasing me through the streets. I bolted into this old church on my right and locked the bolt. They were banging into the door, clambering to get through, the door was creaking... then I woke up."<br /><br />"Interesting..." Ms. Wu said, as she picked up a "Coding Basics for Dummies" book, and placed it on the shelf.<br /><br />"It was so real... even though I've been awake for a few hours now, it still feels real."<br /><br />"Let me ask.." turning to him, "Why were you afraid of them?"<br /><br />The question had not occurred to him. "I...Why wouldn't I be? They were scary monsters."<br /><br />"Sure, but they were locked outside, you were safe inside. You escaped them."<br /><br />"But there were getting in."<br /><br />"Were they? Or were they trying to get in an failing?"<br /><br />Mr. Wu had a knack for turning things upside down.<br /><br /><br /><div style="text-align: center;"><b>***</b></div><div style="text-align: center;"><b><br /></b></div><blockquote class="tr_bq"><i><b><a href="http://www.summit.org/resources/worldview-dictionary/#W" target="_blank">Worldview</a></b>: &nbsp;any ideology, philosophy, theology, movement, or religion that provides an overarching approach to understanding God, the world, and man's relation to God and the world.</i></blockquote><div><br />Your Worldview affects everything you do. Another way to think of Worldview is "Core Beliefs".<br /><br />What you believe about God, the world, man's relationship to God and one another, love, fear, health, relationships, your personal value, the value of other human lives, etc, etc... affects everything you do.<br /><br />The fact is that most people on earth have given little to no thought about their own Worldview. Even those of us who have given much thought can fall into patterns based on heart beliefs that we have yet to identify.<br /><br />As a writer, itâ€™s an interesting paradoxâ€¦<br /><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq">1.<span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"> </span>When one tries to â€œmake a pointâ€ it usually comes across as straight allegory (<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Pilgrim%27s_Progress" target="_blank">Pilgrims Progress</a>), it's great for teaching a lesson, but really a great "story".&nbsp;</blockquote><blockquote class="tr_bq">2.<span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"> </span>When one just writes to tell a great story, but, has a strong yet generic world view it comes across as a great story (but has no clear "specific" lesson) (<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Lord_of_the_Rings" target="_blank">Lord of the Rings</a>).</blockquote><blockquote class="tr_bq">3.<span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"> </span>When one writes to tell a great story, but, has a VERY distinct world view they write from it comes across as a great story (but has a clear lesson) (<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Chronicles_of_Narnia" target="_blank">Chronicles of Narnia</a>).</blockquote><br />I think I want to land somewhere between two and three.<br /><br />If you are not familiar with Worldviews, this <a href="http://www.summit.org/resources/worldview-chart/" target="_blank">Worldview Chart </a>shows a breakdown of the most common&nbsp;Worldviews&nbsp;you will encounter in this modern world.</div><br /><br /><h4>Your Turn: What's your story?</h4><h4><div style="font-weight: normal;"><br /></div><blockquote class="tr_bq" style="font-weight: normal;">Tell the LIFE community about a story you encountered this week, and what you learned from it.&nbsp;</blockquote><br /><div style="font-weight: normal;"><b>Comment on this post, or Hit me up on Twitter&nbsp;<a href="https://twitter.com/darrellwolfe" target="_blank">@DarrellWolfe&nbsp;</a>,&nbsp;Google&nbsp;<a class="g-profile" href="https://plus.google.com/106337514196493406365" target="_blank">+DarrellWolfe</a>, Facebook&nbsp;<a href="https://www.facebook.com/groups/907869989282584/" target="_blank">DarrellGWolfe</a>,&nbsp;</b></div></h4><b><br /></b><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><b>Tweet These:</b><br />#<a href="http://ctt.ec/8E5X7" target="_blank">TellYourStory</a>#<a href="http://ctt.ec/5xc67" target="_blank">BeStillBeLed</a></blockquote><br /><h4>By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></h4><blockquote class="tr_bq"><i>Storyteller, Creative,&nbsp;<a href="http://www.16personalities.com/infj-personality" target="_blank">INFJ</a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://www.gallupstrengthscenter.com/Purchase/en-US/Product?Path=Clifton%20StrengthsFinder" target="_blank">Intellection</a>, Ideation, Input, Learner, Achiever</i></blockquote><i><br /></i><br /><hr color="black" noshade="" /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cover-art-e0f7cc956c34.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><br /><img border="0" height="232" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cover-art-e0f7cc956c34.png" width="320" /></a></div><div><br /><div><ul><li><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , &quot;times new roman&quot; , serif;"><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/about-20.html" target="_blank">New Here? Start HERE</a></span></li><li><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , &quot;times new roman&quot; , serif;"><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/got-freedom.html" target="_blank">Got LIFE?</a></span></li><li><a href="http://eepurl.com/MzAVr" target="_blank">Sign up for email delivery of these posts here</a>.&nbsp;</li></ul><ul><li><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/blog-page_27.html" target="_blank">Links to Resources</a></li><li><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/my-tool-box.html" target="_blank">My Tool Box</a></li><li><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/books-resources.html" target="_blank">Book Suggestions</a></li><li><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/banking-basics-for-believers-book-by.html" target="_blank">Click Here To Get My Book: "Banking Basics for Believers"</a>, which guides you through the basics of banking and money from a Christian Perspective.&nbsp;</li></ul><div></div><div></div></div><div><b>For more book suggestions, see my Amazon Store:</b></div><div><br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;" target="_blank"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/amazon-button-8fb3d7b755c7.gif" /></a></div><div><br /></div><div><br /></div><b>Other Hobby Sties by Darrell:</b><br /><br /><ul><li><a href="http://discerningthetime.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">http://discerningthetime.blogspot.com</a></li><ul><li>End Times Prophecy Study</li></ul><li><a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">http://authorfun.blogspot.com</a></li><ul><li>Fiction and Flash Fiction Practice</li></ul><li><a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/" target="_blank">http://www.lifeinfortworth.com</a></li><ul><li>Discover, Navigate, and Enjoy Fort Worth Texas. Reviews</li></ul></ul></div>
